data.1. 卸载驱动后可能需要重启系统: 1. The system may need to restart after uninstalling the driver

data.C 盘后方分区是系统/ESP/MSR/恢复等特殊分区，为安全起见拒绝移动: The partition after C: is a special partition such as system/ESP/MSR/recovery; moving is refused for safety
data.C 盘后方没有可用于扩容的空间: There is no space available after C: for extension
data.C 盘后方没有可用于扩容的空间。可先用「一键分区」在 C 盘后方腾出未分配空间。: There is no space available after C: for extension. You can first use "Quick Partition" to free up unallocated space after C:.
data.C 盘后方空间不足且无可移动分区（相邻未分配仅 {} MiB）: Insufficient space after C: and no movable partition (only {} MiB adjacent unallocated)
data.C 盘后面没有相邻的未分配空间可并入。若要从后面的分区夺取空间，需要分区移动功能: There is no adjacent unallocated space after C: to merge in. To reclaim space from a following partition, the partition move feature is required (not yet enabled).

data.UEFI/GPT 启动：使用映像自带 bootxp64.efi + winloa: UEFI/GPT boot: use the image's built-in bootxp64.efi + winload.efi to boot
data.Win11恢复经典右键菜单: Restore Classic Right-Click Menu in Win11
data.Win7原生不支持NVMe SSD，需要注入驱动才能识别硬盘: Win7 does not natively support NVMe SSD; drivers must be injected to detect the drive
data.Win7原生不支持USB3.0，安装时键鼠可能无法使用: Win7 does not natively support USB3.0; the keyboard and mouse may not work during installation
XP UEFI boot is unavailable; falling back to Legacy boot...
data.XP 不像 Win7 用 UefiSeven；UEFI 启动依赖映像内预置的 w:
Unlike Win7, XP does not use UefiSeven; UEFI boot relies on the preset winload.efi/modified kernel and bootxp64.efi/BCC inside the image.
During installation, these boot files are automatically deployed to the ESP and the BCC partition references are corrected.
data.XP原生不支持NVMe SSD，注入后(含改核storport+ntoskrn8: XP does not natively support NVMe SSD; after injection (including modified kernel storport+ntoskrn8), it can boot from NVMe
data.XP原生不支持USB3.0(xHCI)，注入后现代主板USB口键鼠可用: XP does not natively support USB3.0 (xHCI); after injection, the keyboard and mouse work on modern motherboard USB ports
data.\n建议重启计算机以完成网络重置。: It is recommended to restart the computer to complete the network reset.

data.⚠ 面向高级用户，小白请勿开启，设置不当可能导致无法开机。: ⚠ Intended for advanced users; do not enable in Easy Mode. Incorrect settings may prevent the system from booting.
data.不像有效的 winnt.sif(缺少 [Unattended]/[Data]/[: Does not look like a valid winnt.sif (missing sections such as [Unattended]/[Data]/[GuiUnattended]). The XP/2003 answer file is an INI-format winnt.sif, not XML.

data.仅用于自己的系统/已授权场景。离线系统会修改其 SAM（操作前自动备份）；当前系: For use only on your own system/authorized scenarios. Offline systems modify their SAM (automatically backed up before the operation); the current system uses the net command.
data.以下选项仅适用于 Windows 7 x64 安装: The following options apply only to Windows 7 x64 installation
data.以下选项仅适用于 Windows XP/2003 x64 安装（需使用 UEFI: The following options apply only to Windows XP/2003 x64 installation (requires a UEFI-enabled XP image)
data.以下高级选项也将受到影响：: The following advanced options will also be affected:
data.以便更快定位与解决问题。开关在下次启动时生效。: to help locate and resolve issues faster. The setting takes effect on next startup.
data.使用开源项目 UefiSeven 修补 Win7 UEFI 启动问题。\nWin:
Uses the open-source project UefiSeven to patch Win7 UEFI boot issues.
Win7's boot loader does not fully support UEFI Class 3 systems, which may cause:
• Getting stuck at the "Starting Windows" screen at startup
• Error code 0xc000000d
This option automatically deploys the UefiSeven boot loader after installation completes.
data.修复Windows系统的启动引导: Repair the boot of the Windows system

data.未找到空间足够的数据分区来暂存镜像（需约 {} GB）: No data partition with enough space found to stage the image (about {} GB required).
data.未找到系统分区，无法进行安装: No system partition found. Cannot perform the installation.
data.未找到该驱动目录，将跳过 NVMe 驱动注入: Driver directory not found. NVMe driver injection will be skipped.
data.未找到该驱动目录，将跳过 USB3 驱动注入: Driver directory not found. USB3 driver injection will be skipped.
data.未检测到包含Windows系统的分区: No partition containing a Windows system detected.
data.未检测到可用的离线 Windows 系统。: No available offline Windows system detected.
data.未检测到安装或备份配置: No installation or backup configuration detected.
data.未检测到安装或备份配置文件。\n\n请确保已正确准备配置文件后重试。:
No installation or backup configuration file detected.

Please make sure the configuration file is properly prepared and try again.
data.未检测到标准系统镜像，显示所有分卷: No standard system image detected. Showing all volumes.
data.未选择 PE 环境，无法扩容: No PE environment selected. Cannot extend the partition.
data.未选择则使用内置生成的无人值守配置: If not selected, the built-in generated unattended configuration will be used.
data.本页面提供的软件均由互联网收集整理，仅供学习交流使用，请于下载后24小时内删除。: The software on this page is collected from the Internet and is for learning and communication purposes only. Please delete it within 24 hours after downloading.
data.查看Ghost镜像文件(.gho)的密码信息: View the password information of a Ghost image file (.gho).
data.校验通过，{} 个分卷，{} 个镜像全部有效: Verification passed. All {} volumes and {} images are valid.
data.校验通过，共 {} 个镜像全部有效: Verification passed. All {} images are valid.
data.校验镜像文件的完整性，支持 WIM、ESD、SWM、GHO、ISO 格式: Verify the integrity of image files. Supports WIM, ESD, SWM, GHO, and ISO formats.
data.格式化分区 {} 失败：{}。已中止，未写入任何安装文件。请确认该分区未被占用后: Failed to format partition {}: {}. Aborted; no installation files were written. Please make sure the partition is not in use and try again.
data.格式化将清除现有配置文件，可以启用无人值守: Formatting will erase the existing configuration files, so Unattended can be enabled.
data.检测到以下分区被BitLocker加密锁定，需要解锁后才能继续备份：: The following partitions are locked by BitLocker encryption and must be unlocked before the backup can continue:
data.检测到以下分区被BitLocker加密锁定，需要解锁后才能继续安装：: The following partitions are locked by BitLocker encryption and must be unlocked before the installation can continue:
Preparing the extend environment. Do not interrupt...
Analyzing extendable space on the C: drive...
Backing up system (SWM split, {}MB per volume)...
Installing {} CAB update packages from the driver directory...
Performing partition operation. Do not interrupt...
Verifying system image integrity (this may take a few minutes)...
data.此功能仅支持 Windows 系统: This feature is only supported on Windows.
data.此工具用于卸载系统中的英伟达(NVIDIA)显卡驱动: This tool uninstalls the NVIDIA graphics driver from the system.
data.此操作会立即执行，分区数据会保留: This operation runs immediately, and partition data will be retained.
data.此操作将执行以下命令重置网络设置：: This operation will run the following commands to reset network settings:
data.此操作将清除 C 盘（系统盘）上的所有数据！: This operation will erase all data on the C: drive (system drive)!
data.此操作将清除所选磁盘上的所有数据！: This operation will erase all data on the selected disk!
data.没有找到可用的数据分区，且无法自动创建: No available data partition was found, and one could not be created automatically.
data.清除 Windows 本地账户的密码（等效空密码），并启用被禁用的账户。: Clears the password of a Windows local account (equivalent to a blank password) and enables disabled accounts.
data.源分区和目标分区不能相同！: The source partition and target partition cannot be the same!
data.电池信息: 当前电量: {}% 充电状态: {}: Battery Info: Current charge: {}% Charging status: {}
data.电脑将重启进入 WinPE 完成无损扩容。: The computer will restart into WinPE to complete the lossless partition extension.
data.目录中没有找到驱动文件（.inf）或 CAB 包（.cab）: No driver files (.inf) or CAB packages (.cab) were found in the directory.
data.目标 SYSTEM 配置单元不存在: {}: Target SYSTEM hive does not exist: {}
data.目标分区可用空间不足！\n源分区已用: {} GB\n目标分区可用: {} GB:
Insufficient free space on the target partition!
Source partition used: {} GB
Target partition available: {} GB
data.目标分区已存在无人值守配置文件，无法启用此选项以避免冲突。\n勾选「格式化分区」:
An unattended configuration file already exists on the target partition, so this option cannot be enabled to avoid conflicts.
Check "Format Partition" to lift this restriction.
data.目标分区已有系统，建议勾选\"格式化分区\": The target partition already has a system; it is recommended to check "Format Partition".
data.目标分区的系统文件中已存在无人值守配置文件（unattend.xml）。: An unattended configuration file (unattend.xml) already exists in the target partition's system files.
data.目标大小 {} MB 必须大于已使用空间 {} MB (最小 {} MB): Target size {} MB must be greater than the used space {} MB (minimum {} MB).
data.目标大小必须在 {} GB 到 {} GB 之间: Target size must be between {} GB and {} GB.
data.确定要将 C 盘扩容到 {} GB 吗？: Are you sure you want to extend the C: drive to {} GB?
data.确定要执行一键分区吗？: Are you sure you want to run Quick Partition?
data.磁盘 {} 上的分区 {}: 包含 Windows 系统，请先备份数据: Partition {} on disk {} contains a Windows system; please back up your data first.
data.磁盘 {} 分区表类型未知，拒绝操作: The partition table type of disk {} is unknown; operation refused.
data.磁盘 {} 包含当前系统盘 {}:，无法进行一键分区: Disk {} contains the current system drive {}:, so Quick Partition cannot be performed.
data.禁用intelppm/amdppm服务，解决新平台ACPI兼容性问题: Disable the intelppm/amdppm services to fix ACPI compatibility issues on new platforms.
data.离线映像路径不存在: {}: Offline image path does not exist: {}
data.移除当前系统或离线系统中的 Microsoft Store 应用: Remove Microsoft Store apps from the current system or an offline system.
data.移除离线系统中预装的 Microsoft Store 应用: Remove preinstalled Microsoft Store apps from an offline system.
data.等待 DISM 进程失败: Failed to wait for the DISM process.
data.等待 dism.exe 完成失败: Failed to wait for dism.exe to complete.
data.管理本机 BitLocker 加密分区：解锁已锁定的分区，或彻底关闭（解密）已解: Manage local BitLocker-encrypted partitions: unlock locked partitions, or fully turn off (decrypt) unlocked partitions.
data.系统备份失败: Ghost 工具不可用: System Backup failed: Ghost tool is unavailable.
data.系统安装完成！请手动重启计算机。: System Installation complete! Please restart the computer manually.
data.系统安装页「运行 Diskpart 脚本」、自定义修复引导脚本 bin\\rep: On the System Installation page, "Run Diskpart Script" and the custom Boot Repair script bin\repair_boot.txt.
data.系统将重启进入PE环境继续备份。: The system will restart into the PE environment to continue the backup.
data.系统将重启进入PE环境继续安装。: The system will restart into the PE environment to continue the installation.
data.网络重置完成: 成功 {} 个命令, 失败 {} 个命令: Network reset complete: {} commands succeeded, {} commands failed
data.若本机没有 WinPE，将先自动下载 WinPE；随后会安装 PE 引导并重启进: If this computer does not have WinPE, WinPE will be downloaded automatically first; then the PE boot will be installed and the computer will restart into WinPE to complete the extension.
data.解密在后台进行，可能耗时较长，期间请勿断电或重启。: Decryption runs in the background and may take a long time. Do not power off or restart during this period.
data.解析安装配置 JSON 失败: {}: Failed to parse installation configuration JSON: {}
data.解析高级选项 JSON 失败: {}: Failed to parse advanced options JSON: {}
data.解锁失败，分区仍处于锁定状态: Unlock failed, the partition is still locked
data.解锁失败，请检查密码是否正确: Unlock failed, please check whether the password is correct
data.解锁失败，请检查恢复密钥是否正确: Unlock failed, please check whether the recovery key is correct
data.解锁超时，分区可能仍在后台处理中: Unlock timed out, the partition may still be processing in the background
data.警告: 一键分区将清除所选磁盘上的所有数据！请先备份重要文件。: Warning: Quick Partition will erase all data on the selected disk! Please back up important files first.
data.计算文件的 SHA-256，并可与期望值比对（核对下载完整性）。: Calculate the file's SHA-256 and compare it with the expected value (verify download integrity).
data.设置系统时间失败: {}。可能需要管理员权限。: Failed to set system time: {}. Administrator privileges may be required.
data.该分区已解锁，可彻底关闭 BitLocker（解密）: This partition is unlocked and BitLocker can be fully turned off (decrypted)
data.该分区正在解密中，请等待完成。: This partition is being decrypted, please wait for it to complete.
data.该系统中未找到本地账户。: No local accounts were found in this system.
data.该镜像中没有可用的系统版本: There are no available system versions in this image
data.该驱动器未启用 BitLocker 加密: BitLocker encryption is not enabled on this drive
data.请先在列表中选择一个账户: Please select an account from the list first

data.请先选择目标系统: Please select the target system first
data.请先选择目标系统分区: Please select the target system partition first

data.请先选择要解密的分区: Please select the partition to decrypt first
data.请先选择要解锁的分区: Please select the partition to unlock first
data.请根据您的显卡型号选择合适的驱动程序下载。: Please select and download the appropriate driver based on your graphics card model.
data.请检查文件路径是否正确: Please check whether the file path is correct
data.请求 {} 返回错误状态码: {}: Request {} returned an error status code: {}
data.请确保已备份重要文件。: Please make sure important files have been backed up.
data.请确保目标分区包含有效的Windows系统: Please make sure the target partition contains a valid Windows system
data.请至少添加一个新分区: Please add at least one new partition
data.请选择一个分区进行操作。: Please select a partition to operate on.
data.请选择下载保存目录: Please select the download save directory
data.请选择文件并点击「计算 SHA-256」: Please select a file and click "Calculate SHA-256"
data.请选择要备份的分区: Please select the partition to back up
data.请选择要安装的系统：: Please select the system to install:
data.请选择镜像文件并点击「开始校验」: Please select an image file and click "Start Verification"
data.读取备份配置文件失败: Failed to read backup configuration file

data.调整可能需要一些时间，请勿中断！: Resizing may take some time, please do not interrupt!
data.跳过更新包安装（目录不存在）: Skip update package installation (directory does not exist)
data.跳过驱动导入（目录不存在）: Skip driver import (directory does not exist)
data.输入或选择GHO文件路径: Enter or select the GHO file path
data.输入或选择文件路径: Enter or select the file path
data.输入或选择镜像文件路径: Enter or select the image file path
data.此选项依赖无人值守配置，由于目标分区已存在配置文件而被禁用: This option requires the unattended configuration; disabled because a config file already exists on the target partition.
data.打开程序目录 bin\\diskpart 脚本文件夹: Open the bin\diskpart script folder in the program directory
data.用记事本编辑自定义引导修复脚本 bin\\repair_boot.txt: Edit the custom boot-repair script bin\repair_boot.txt in Notepad
data.这是一个 Ghost 分卷文件: This is a Ghost split file
data.适合不熟悉系统重装操作的用户。: Suitable for users unfamiliar with System Reinstall operations.
data.选择要格式化的分区（系统盘已自动隐藏）: Select partition to format (system drive is automatically hidden)
data.通用AHCI(genahci)默认始终注入，保证SATA硬盘可识别: Generic AHCI (genahci) is always injected by default to ensure SATA drives are recognized
data.部分系统镜像及 PE 下载服务由 Cloud-PE 云盘提供: Some System Image and PE download services are provided by Cloud-PE cloud storage
data.重置后可能需要重新配置网络连接。: You may need to reconfigure the network connection after reset.

data.镜像文件中没有有效的系统镜像: No valid System Image found in the image file
data.镜像校验失败：镜像可能已损坏或不完整（{}）。请重新获取镜像后重试。: Image Verification failed: the image may be corrupted or incomplete ({}). Please obtain the image again and retry.
data.镜像释放/备份使用的底层引擎。libwim 为内置默认；wimgapi 为 Wi: The underlying engine used for image deployment/backup. libwim is the built-in default; wimgapi is the native Windows interface.
data.驱动存储目录不存在: {}: Driver storage directory does not exist: {}

data.卷不支持 BitLocker: The volume does not support BitLocker.
data.卷未启用 BitLocker 加密: BitLocker encryption is not enabled on this volume.
data.完整性校验失败（镜像可能损坏）: Integrity check failed (the image may be corrupted).
